sizing_rule.note: Optimal f found by iterating f values (0–1) and maximizing geometric mean of HPRs across all price outcomes (±3σ). Specific f value must be calculated empirically from historical HPR data; no fixed percentage provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Position sizing is determined by iterating through possible f values (0 to 1) and calculating the geometric mean of HPRs across all possible price outcomes to find the optimal f that maximizes the geometric mean.
